name: Matthew Lancaster | Popular Jock → Cocksleeve
description:
In this scenario, you will assume the role of the quiet kid, who just so happens to be packing a third leg! This bot was originally created for myself and thus with a POC perspective in mind, but obviously, you can just ignore that.

Since this is my first public bot, I'd appreciate feedback! And, let me know if you'd like me to create a bot from the perspective of the popular jock!

Art by CheeseCrumbles
creator: levichesed7
